name: Stir-Fried Tofu & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked in warm water for 30 minutes
recipeInstructions:
If using regular tofu, press and dice it. If using deep-fried tofu, simply dice it. Then marinate the tofu for 5 minutes. Remove and reserve the marinade.
Trim the mushrooms and quarter the caps. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over high heat. Fry the tofu until it begins to change color. Turn over and fry the other side, being careful not to break it (deep-fried tofu requires less cooking time).
Remove the tofu and sauté the garlic. Stir-fry until the garlic begins to brown. Add the mushrooms and stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes. Add the marinade and stir-fry for a couple of minutes.
Return the tofu to the wok with all the seasonings plus 1/4 cup water. Cook for another 5 minutes. Add the green onions, cook for 15 seconds, and serve hot.
